summary: Comprehensive testing of upmuch CRM new features completed. All 24 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI testing shows all features working correctly. Fixed a bug in pipeline report endpoint where deal_stages could be None.

fixed_during_testing.issue: TypeError when deal_stages is None in platform_settings
fixed_during_testing.fix: Added fallback to default stages when settings.get('deal_stages') returns None

passed_tests: Support contact form submission (stores in DB)
Update platform settings (support email, VAT rate)
Deal creation without task fails validation
Frontend: Deals page with filters (stage, tag, owner)
Frontend: Tasks page with filters (status, owner)
Frontend: Pipeline Report with Admin View badge
Frontend: Deal creation form with mandatory task section
critical_code_review_comments: User florian@unyted.world has role 'owner' not 'super_admin' - may need to update role in database if super_admin access is required
Email sending for contact form is MOCKED - stores in database only, no actual email sent
seed_data_creation: Test deals and tasks created during testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features implemented and working: 1) Deal probability and expected_close_date fields, 2) Mandatory task creation when creating deals, 3) Tags on deals with filter, 4) Filters for deals (stage, tag, owner) and tasks (status, owner), 5) Pipeline report with stage summaries and admin/user views, 6) Admin settings for Stripe/PayPal/Crypto/Support email, 7) Support page with contact form. Email sending is MOCKED.

mocked_apis.email_sending: Contact form submissions are stored in database but no actual email is sent

features_verified.pipeline_report: ✓ Working - stage summaries with values and weighted values
features_verified.admin_vs_user_view: ✓ Working - Admin View badge shown for admin users
features_verified.create_deal_with_task: ✓ Working - mandatory task section in deal form
